name: SC - The Wild Ones (2025) (GB)
plot: Explore hidden corners of Earth with a trio of experts as they try to save six endangered species from extinction. With crafty camerawork and survival skills, the team race to find, record, and protect these elusive creatures before it's too late.
cast: Declan Burley, Vianet Djenguet, Aldo Kane

name: SC - Bibaa & Nicole: Murder in the Park (2025) (GB)
plot: A documentary exposing the police misconduct which compounded a double murder in 2020. Plus, a harrowing but ultimately uplifting commemoration of the Bradford City fire and the 2025 TV Baftas

name: SC - Smoke (2025) (US)
plot: When an arson investigator begrudgingly teams up with a police detective, their race to stop two arsonists ignites a twisted game of secrets and suspicions.
cast: Taron Egerton, Jurnee Smollett, John Leguizamo, Rafe Spall, Greg Kinnear, Ntare Guma Mbaho Mwine, Hannah Emily Anderson

name: SC - Prime Target (2025) (GB)
plot: A brilliant math student is on the verge of a major breakthrough when a shadowy enemy tries to stop him. Fighting for answers—and his life—he teams up with a government agent to unravel a high-stakes conspiracy.
cast: Leo Woodall, Quintessa Swindell, Sidse Babett Knudsen, Stephen Rea, Fra Fee, Martha Plimpton, Harry Lloyd, Ali Suliman

name: SC - Dope Thief (2025) (US)
plot: Two lifelong friends in Philadelphia pose as DEA agents to rob small-time drug dealers. It's a perfect grift—until they choose the wrong mark and become targets of a massive narcotics enterprise.
cast: Brian Tyree Henry, Wagner Moura, Marin Ireland, Amir Arison, Nesta Cooper, Kate Mulgrew, Ving Rhames

name: SC - Side Quest (2025) (US)
plot: Go deeper into the Mythic Quest universe in these four standalone stories. Follow the lives of players, comic book shop owners, touring orchestra musicians, and members of the art department as they search for community, success, and love.
director: Ashly Burch, John Howell Harris, Katie McElhenney

name: SC - The Studio (2025) (US)
plot: Desperate for celebrity approval, the newly appointed head of a movie studio and his executive team at Continental Studios must juggle corporate demands with creative ambitions as they try to keep movies alive and relevant.
cast: Seth Rogen, Catherine O'Hara, Ike Barinholtz, Chase Sui Wonders, Kathryn Hahn
director: Peter Huyck, Alex Gregory, Seth Rogen

name: SC - Government Cheese (2025) (US)
plot: When Hampton is released from prison, his long-awaited family reunion doesn't quite go as he hoped. In his absence, Hampton's wife and sons formed an unconventional family unit, and his return spins their world into chaos.
cast: David Oyelowo, Simone Missick, Jahi Di'Allo Winston, Evan Ellison, Bokeem Woodbine, Jeremy Bobb, Louis Cancelmi, Adam Beach

name: SC - Carême (2025) (FR)
plot: Witness the rise of the world's first celebrity chef, Antonin Carême, and his descent into espionage in Napoleon-era France—where manipulation is king. With his gifts for gastronomy and seduction, he becomes the perfect weapon in a fight for power.
cast: Benjamin Voisin, Jérémie Renier, Lyna Khoudri, Sigrid Bouaziz, Alice da Luz, Pablo Cobo, Micha Lescot, Juliette Armanet

name: SC - Long Way Home (2025) (GB)
plot: Best friends Ewan McGregor and Charley Boorman gear up for their fourth Long Way series—this time going from Ewan's home in Scotland to Charley's in England. They'll take the scenic route, of course, through 17 European countries on cranky old bikes.
cast: Ewan McGregor, Charley Boorman

name: SC - Murderbot (2025) (US)
plot: In a high-tech future, a rogue security robot secretly gains free will. To stay hidden, it reluctantly joins a new mission protecting scientists on a dangerous planet...even though it just wants to binge soap operas.
cast: Alexander Skarsgård, Noma Dumezweni, David Dastmalchian, Sabrina Wu, Akshay Khanna, Tamara Podemski, Tattiawna Jones

name: SC - Stick (2025) (US)
plot: Pryce Cahill was headed for golf greatness when an on-course meltdown derailed his career. Now struggling to stay afloat, he goes all in to mentor Santi—a teenage phenom with immense potential—and maybe save himself.
cast: Owen Wilson, Peter Dager, Marc Maron, Mariana Treviño, Lilli Kay, Judy Greer, Timothy Olyphant

name: SC - Where's Wanda? (2024) (DE)
plot: After the Klatts' daughter goes missing, they take matters into their own hands and hatch a wild plan: Spy on the neighborhood. As they make their way into small-time espionage, shocking secrets come to light one by one.
cast: Heike Makatsch, Axel Stein, Lea Drinda, Nikeata Thompson, Leo Simon, Palina Rojinski, Kostja Ullmann, Devid Striesow

name: SC - Disclaimer (2024) (GB)
plot: When an intriguing novel appears at the bedside of a journalist whose career has been built on revealing transgressions, she is horrified to realize she's a key character in a long-buried story—one that exposes her darkest secret.
cast: Cate Blanchett, Kevin Kline, Sacha Baron Cohen, Lesley Manville, Louis Partridge, Leila George, Indira Varma, Kodi Smit-McPhee

name: SC  - Constellation (2024) (DE)
plot: When a fatal accident occurs on board the International Space Station, a lone astronaut makes the heroic journey back to Earth, only to discover key pieces of her life—including her young daughter—have changed.
cast: Noomi Rapace, Jonathan Banks, James D'Arcy, Rosie Coleman, Davina Coleman, William Catlett, Julian Looman

name: SC - The Secret Lives of Animals (2024) (GB)
plot: Discover the clever and creative ways animals navigate life’s most extraordinary challenges, from leaving home to finding a partner.
cast: Hugh Bonneville

name: SC - Silo (2023) (US)
plot: In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously, engineer Juliette starts to uncover shocking secrets and the truth about the silo.
cast: Rebecca Ferguson, Common, Harriet Walter, Chinaza Uche, Avi Nash, Rick Gomez, Tim Robbins, Shane McRae

name: SC - The Buccaneers (2023) (GB)
plot: A group of fun-loving American girls burst onto the scene in tightly corseted 1870s London, kicking off an Anglo-American culture clash. Sent to secure husbands and status, the buccaneers' hearts are set on much more than that.
cast: Kristine Froseth, Alisha Boe, Matthew Broome, Josh Dylan, Barney Fishwick, Aubri Ibrag, Guy Remmers, Mia Threapleton

name: SC - Bad Sisters (2022) (GB)
plot: The tight-knit Garvey sisters have always looked out for one another. But when the toxic brother-in-law they all wanted dead actually dies, it turns their lives upside down and tests their bond like nothing before.
cast: Sharon Horgan, Anne-Marie Duff, Eva Birthistle, Sarah Greene, Eve Hewson, Claes Bang
director: Sharon Horgan, Brett Baer, Dave Finkel

name: SC - Alla utom vi (2021) (SE)
plot: Hilma and Ola are desperately trying to get pregnant. They struggle to start a family, while their surroundings get involved with advice on how best to succeed.
cast: Björn Gustafsson, Alba August

name: SC - Calls (2021) (US)
plot: Interconnected phone conversations chronicle the mysterious story of a group of strangers whose lives are thrown into disarray.
cast: Aubrey Plaza, Clancy Brown, Karen Gillan, Nicholas Braun, Lily Collins, Aaron Taylor-Johnson, Riley Keough, Jennifer Tilly

name: SC - Mythic Quest (2020) (US)
plot: Meet the team behind the biggest multiplayer video game of all time. But in a workplace focused on building worlds, molding heroes, and creating legends, the most hard-fought battles don’t occur in the game—they happen in the office.
cast: Rob Mac, Charlotte Nicdao, Ashly Burch, Naomi Ekperigin, Jessie Ennis, Imani Hakim, Danny Pudi, David Hornsby
director: Rob Mac, Charlie Day, Megan Ganz

name: SC - Amazing Stories (2020) (US)
plot: Each episode transports the audience to worlds of wonder through the lens of today’s most imaginative filmmakers, directors and writers. A reimagining of the original anthology series by Steven Spielberg.
director: Adam Horowitz, Edward Kitsis, Steven Spielberg

name: SC - Home Before Dark (2020) (US)
plot: Young investigative journalist Hilde Lisko moves with her family to the small town her father left behind, only to unearth shocking secrets in her pursuit of the truth.
cast: Brooklynn Prince, Jim Sturgess, Abby Miller, Kylie Rogers, Michael Weston, Aziza Scott, Joelle Carter, Louis Herthum

name: SC - Dear Edward
plot: A 12-year-old boy survives a plane crash that kills every other passenger on the flight, including his family. As he and others affected by the tragedy try to make sense of what happened, unexpected friendships, romances, and communities are formed.
cast: Connie Britton, Taylor Schilling, Colin O'Brien, Anna Uzele, Idris Debrand, Carter Hudson, Eva Ariel Binder, Amy Forsyth

name: SC - Liaison
plot: Two agents—and former lovers—must work together to combat international cyberattacks threatening the UK while also confronting the buried secrets of their destructive relationship.
cast: Vincent Cassel, Eva Green, Peter Mullan, Gérard Lanvin, Daniel Francis, Stanislas Merhar, Irène Jacob, Laëtitia Eïdo

name: SC - Ted Lasso (2020) (US)
plot: Ted Lasso, an American football coach, moves to England when he’s hired to manage a soccer team—despite having no experience. With cynical players and a doubtful town, will he get them to see the Ted Lasso Way?
cast: Jason Sudeikis, Hannah Waddingham, Jeremy Swift, Phil Dunster, Brett Goldstein, Brendan Hunt, Nick Mohammed, Anthony Stewart Head
director: Jason Sudeikis, Bill Lawrence, Brendan Hunt

name: SC - Messi Meets America (2023) (US)
plot: Join Lionel Messi as he embarks on his historic next chapter—taking North America and Major League Soccer by storm, and ushering in a new era of the game with his Inter Miami CF teammates.
cast: Lionel Messi

name: SC - Masters of the Air (2024) (US)
plot: During World War II, airmen risk their lives with the 100th Bomb Group, a brotherhood forged by courage, loss, and triumph.
cast: Austin Butler, Callum Turner, Anthony Boyle, Nate Mann, Stephen Campbell Moore

name: SC - STEVE! (martin) a documentary in 2 pieces (2024) (US)
plot: Steve Martin is one of the most beloved and enigmatic figures in entertainment. Dive into his extraordinary story from two distinct points of view—past and present—as Martin reflects on how his beginnings led to his unexpectedly fulfilling life today.
cast: Steve Martin

name: SC - FROM (2022) (US)
plot: Unravel the mystery of a nightmarish town in middle America that traps all those who enter. As the unwilling residents fight to keep a sense of normalcy and search for a way out, they must also survive the threats of the surrounding forest – including the terrifying creatures that come out when the sun goes down.
cast: Harold Perrineau, Catalina Sandino Moreno, Eion Bailey, David Alpay, Elizabeth Saunders, Scott McCord, Ricky He, Chloe Van Landschoot

name: SC - The Looming Tower (2018) (US)
plot: While Osama bin Laden and Al-Qaeda become a global threat, the rivalry between the CIA and FBI inadvertently sets the stage for the tragedy of 9/11 and the Iraq War.
cast: Jeff Daniels, Tahar Rahim, Wrenn Schmidt, Bill Camp, Louis Cancelmi, Virginia Kull, Ella Rae Peck, Sullivan Jones
director: Lawrence Wright, Dan Futterman, Alex Gibney

name: SC - Franklin (2024) (US)
plot: In December 1776, Benjamin Franklin is world-famous for his electrical experiments. But his passion and power are put to the test when he embarks on a secret mission to France—with the fate of American independence hanging in the balance.
cast: Michael Douglas, Noah Jupe, Daniel Mays, Ludivine Sagnier, Thibault de Montalembert, Assaad Bouab, Théodore Pellerin

name: SC - Sugar (2024) (US)
plot: An enigmatic private detective struggles with personal demons as he investigates the disappearance of a Hollywood producer's beloved granddaughter.
cast: Colin Farrell, Kirby Howell-Baptiste, Amy Ryan, Dennis Boutsikaris, Nate Corddry, Alex Hernandez, James Cromwell

name: SC - Dark Matter (2024) (US)
plot: Jason Dessen is abducted into an alternate version of his life. To get back to his true family, he embarks on a harrowing journey to save them from the most terrifying foe imaginable: himself.
cast: Joel Edgerton, Jennifer Connelly, Alice Braga, Jimmi Simpson, Dayo Okeniyi, Oakes Fegley

name: SC - Trying (2020) (GB)
plot: All Nikki and Jason want is a baby—the one thing they can't have. So they decide to adopt. With their dysfunctional friends, screwball families, and chaotic lives, will the adoption panel agree that they're ready to be parents?
cast: Rafe Spall, Esther Smith, Scarlett Rayner, Cooper Turner
